categories.description: Error caused by invalid parameters, invalid JSON, or syntax error
401 Unauthorized  or 403 Forbidden error caused by invalid  or expired credential, secret, invalid password, failed authentication or authorization such as a bad API key or password
504 Gateway timeout caused by API server not responding,
429 Too many requests error caused by rate limiting  in API

Any other type of error connecting to API such as 404 status, 500 status, Bad request , 500 Something went wrong
503 Service unavailable, Quota exceeded, or ECONNREFUSED

parameters.content:
# Document Processing - Logging
## AI Automation
Samantha Smith
1/25/2026

This sub-workflow logs data is triggered by Document Processing  and Document Processing - Error Handling workflows. It extracts the data from the call, calculates durations from start and stop time of the execution, and implements a Text Classifier AI to determine error type. Then the data is written into the spread with a timestamp (UTC) included.     

INPUT: executionID, errorMessage 
OUTPUT: logging data to Run Logs sheett
* timestamp
* status
* processing_time_sec
* error_type

parameters.subject: The Company - Lead Proposal
parameters.message:
=
Dear {{$('Setup fields for processing').item.json.repName}}
Thank you for reaching out to [Company name] and selecting our {{ $('Setup fields for processing').item.json.packagePlan }} package.

We're excited to have you on board! Our team has received your application and will be in touch shortly to discuss the next steps. Your success is our priority, and we're committed to delivering results that exceed your expectations.

Please find your proposal here: {{ $('Upload PDF file to Google Drive').item.json.webViewLink }}

To move forward, schedule a call with our team to finalize your plan: 📅 Book Your Call: [calendar_link]

If you have any questions in the meantime, feel free to reply to this email

We look forward to speaking with you soon!

parameters.content:
# Case 1: Document Processing Workflow Design
## AI Automations
Samantha Smith
1/15/2026

### Purpose
Part 1
- Accept client details from web form 
(https://forms.fillout.com/t/8N7RWhu1YDus)
- Store client details into spreadsheet
- Prepare proposal PDF
- Send proposal PDF to client

Part 2
- Accept confirmation from web form
- Update spread sheet
- If accepted, notify internal team


### *Changes*
- Configure Fillout form to allow users to edit their own details, 
such as package plan, and re-submit. The workflow should detect 
the submission through webhook.
- Include a link in the email containing the proposal that will direct
client to a chatbot in case they need more clarifications.

parameters.content:
### COMPLETED_ADDING_DETAILS
Log inserting records into spreadsheet

### START_NOTIFICATION_NO_PLAN
Set status for no plan

### START_PDF_GENERATION
Creating PDF file from template

### START_PROPOSAL_PROCESS
Set status for preparing proposal PDF

### START_ADDING_DETAILS
Log inserting records into spreadsheet

### COMPLETED_WORKFLOW_WITH_PLAN
End of workflow for package plan

### COMPLETED_WORKFLOW_NO_PLAN
End of workflow for no plan

### COMPLETED_PROPOSAL_PROCESS
End of total proposal process

###  COMPLETED_PDF_RETRIEVAL
Retrieved PDF file from API

### START_PDF_RETRIEVAL
Get generated PDF file from API
### Wait for PDF.co API to process PDF
